title: How a Magento 2 Upgrade Broke Our Multi-Website Setup
excerpt: A deep dive into troubleshooting a Magento 2 multi-website routing issue after an upgrade, and why the root cause was in the Nginx configuration.

title: Magento 2 Upgrade Issue: Missing setup Directory After an Interrupted Composer Install
excerpt: How an interrupted composer install can leave a Magento 2 project without a setup directory, and how to quickly fix it.
